brief: 콤보 포뮬러 미니게임 로비 아이콘. 중앙 조합 박스에 픽셀 캐릭터 순서 조합이 떠 있고 아래 큰 OK 버튼으로 확정하는 캐주얼 퍼즐 순간
style: 16-bit pixel art, Korean retro comedic vibe, punchy casual arcade UI, bright candy colors, clean 1:1 app icon composition, no text

history.generationPrompt: Design a 16-bit pixel art icon for a Korean retro comedic vibe mini-game lobby, featuring a combination formula interface. Centralize a pixel character sequence in a combo box, flanked by bright candy colors and a clean 1:1 app icon layout. Ensure a large 'OK' button is prominently displayed below to confirm selections, capturing the essence of a punchy, casual arcade UI. Exclude any text elements for clarity.
history.makerChangeSummary: Provided a detailed, step-by-step description to ensure the icon captures the desired elements and style while maintaining conciseness. Clarified layout and style to match retro comedic vibe and bright arcade aesthetics.

strengths: Perfectly captures the specific 'Korean retro comedic' aesthetic with the kitschy, digitized face elements in the corners.
Strong visual hierarchy; the central formula and the confirmation button are immediately readable and well-centered.
Vibrant, high-contrast color palette fits the 'candy' and 'arcade' keywords excellently.
issues: Contains the text 'OK' which contradicts the strict 'Exclude any text elements' constraint, although it fulfills the 'OK button' subject request.
Some minor inconsistency in pixel grid alignment/aliasing on the cloud shapes compared to the crispness of the UI elements.
evaluation.revisedPrompt: 16-bit pixel art app icon, central beige panel displaying a crafting recipe: goblin head plus chicken leg equals pixel heart. Below is a large green button with a heavy checkmark symbol. Surrounded by a frame of colorful candy blocks and humorous pixelated realistic faces in corners. Korean retro comic style, bright vibrant colors, clean lines, strictly no text, no letters.
